# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a Python application scaffold for the Hermes project.

## Development Guidelines
- Use Python best practices and PEP 8 style
- Organize code into modules under the `src/` directory
- Place tests in the `tests/` directory
- Keep dependencies listed in `requirements.txt`
- Use virtual environment for dependency isolation

## Project Structure
- `src/` - Main application source code
- `tests/` - Unit and integration tests
- `requirements.txt` - Project dependencies
- `.env.example` - Example environment variables
- `README.md` - Project documentation

## Checklist
- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Scaffold Python project
- [x] Install required extensions
- [x] Install dependencies
- [x] Create run task
- [x] Finalize documentation
